endpoints.name: GET /areas
endpoints.description: Provides the geographical boundaries for all the jurisdictions.

endpoints.name: GET /events
endpoints.description: Provides real time traffic obstruction events.  The event resource provides information about road events (constructions, special events, etc.).

endpoints.name: GET /jurisdiction
endpoints.description: Lists the jurisdictions publishing data through this Open511 API implementation.

endpoints.name: GET /jurisdictiongeography
endpoints.description: Provides the geographical boundaries for all the jurisdictions.
